query:
ALTER TABLE `groups` 
  MODIFY COLUMN `groupCategory` VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN `requiresApprovalChain` TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
  MODIFY COLUMN `defaultWorkflowId` INT DEFAULT NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN `approvalConfig` JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN `internalLiaisonUserId` INT DEFAULT NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN `internalLiaisonGroupId` INT DEFAULT NULL,
  MODIFY COLUMN `slaOverrideHours` INT DEFAULT NULL;
